positive: A mesmerizing, detailed arrangement of bioluminescent flora and celestial elements, forming a unified central mandala design. The primary subject is intertwined jungle foliage (vines, monstera leaves, glowing mushrooms) seamlessly merged with cosmic nebulae and stylized constellations. The style should be ultra-detailed psychedelic neo-art, featuring strong, sharp silhouettes and high contrast. Use deep sapphire blues, iridescent purples, emerald greens, and pops of electric gold for maximum visual impact. The composition must be perfectly centered, scalable, and suitable for a large apparel print. Lighting is dramatic, emanating softly from within the flora and stars, giving everything an ethereal glow. Highly intricate line work, perfect symmetry, high resolution, vector art aesthetic.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, copyright, messy lines, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, low detail, cartoon, childish, logo, trademark
